# Release Draft Template

Use this template when preparing a GitHub release. Copy the content below into the release description when creating the release.

## Release Title
vX.Y.Z — Short descriptive title

## Tag
vX.Y.Z

## Summary
A one-paragraph summary of the release and why it matters.

## Changes
- Added: Short list of added features
- Fixed: Short list of bug fixes
- Changed: Notable behavioral changes

## Changelog entry (keep a short bullet list)
- Feature A — short description
- Fix B — short description

## Breaking Changes
- Describe breaking changes and migration steps, if any.

## Upgrade Notes
- Steps users need to follow when upgrading (config, env vars, DB migrations)

## Assets
- Attach built artifacts (e.g. `apex-1.0.1.vsix`). Ensure the `.vsix` is included.

## Verification
- Smoke test performed: yes/no
- Tested on: OS/versions

## Related Issues / PRs
- #123 — PR title
